subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-06-18
subcodes.first_line: During the days of youth, man sees the pictures of life in all things.... During the lifetime of the king-of-the-martyrs, the heart of the Blessed Beauty.... On day, one of the opposers hit a dog with a stone.... There was a great commotion in the souls upon hearing my address....
subcodes.subjects: @evolution; human evolution, @kindness to and rights of animals
